name: U.S. Possession Resident Exclusion

eligibility.description: Individuals who are bona fide residents of U.S. territories and own local corporations meeting specific income source tests.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes bona fide residents of Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, or the Northern Mariana Islands from being treated as 'United States persons' for CFC purposes under specific conditions.
